texto: Fear and doubt do not kill courage and faith
autor: they birth them. You cannot have courage without fear. You cannot have faith without doubt.
explicacao: Citação de they birth them. You cannot have courage without fear. You cannot have faith without doubt. sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Fear and doubt do not kill courage and faith” articula coragem, steve-maraboli, reflexao em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
